name: documentation_only_prescription
description: Adds an optional 'Documentation only' Yes/No field to the Prescribe command. When set to Yes, the sign-and-send, send, and print actions are removed (in both pre- and post-commit states) so the prescription can be signed but never transmitted or printed.

protocols.description: Adds the 'Documentation only' form field to the Prescribe command in the chart UI and the note printout.
Removes sign-and-send, send, and print actions from the Prescribe command when 'Documentation only' is set to Yes.
